title: Stellar Tweaks
description: Ever wanted Minecraft to have a bit more pizzazz? No? What about better tools? Being fully configurable (With respackopts)? Better creepers? ... Better dirt? Cows? Chickens? Fireworks? ...Wheat? No? Okay fine, how about cool axolotls?
body:
![The Stellar Tweaks creeper with a pride flag background with the text "Happy Pride!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/643e4c80fd2aaf15eecbbcacef4eb1628ad38d24.png)

## Stellar Tweaks is a [fully customizable](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) resource pack focused on keeping the vanilla look and style!
### <u>All mods are 100% optional.</u> 
Additionally, please keep in mind that this pack **does** receive periodic updates with new fixes, tweaks, and content.

Many of the changes are QoL features and the pack even *fixes a few vanilla issues.* Some of the features parity stuff in Bedrock as well! **Images of everything are in the gallery**.
#
![Image that says "Now... The Goods:.](https://i.postimg.cc/85x2gvkT/Now-The-Goods-ST.png)

<details><summary>Click to see the full list of features</summary>

### Reminder that almost everything can be toggled on/off with the help of [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)!

Items:
- Tools sprites were updated to match the new color palette for their respective materials
- Bow color palette matches crossbow
- Redone bow animation
- Redone crossbow animation
- Crossbow model so the string doesn't clip through the entire crossbow
- Accurate spyglass, the spyglass sprite & model reflect its crafting recipe.
- Eating particles are fixed, no more eating apple stems, bowls, and glow berry leaves
- 3D firework rocket models
- 3D held torches & lever
- Animated bottle o' enchanting/experience bottle
- Centered ender pearls and eyes
- Centered music discs
- Melons and bowls were told to be there or be square and chose square (Square melons and square bowls)
- Arrows have flint heads
- The flower pot has been squarified
- Better emerald texture
- Axolotl bucket variants


Blocks:
- Better dirt & dirt variants (Affects ALL instances of dirt, rooted, mycelium, snowy, etc.)
- Better stone and stone variants
- Deepslate variants
- (Overworld) Ore variants
- Grass & tall grass now have variation to them
- Glow berry vines (Cave vines) now have variation
- Better looking & variated sunflowers
- Variated crafting table sides
- Animated torches (torch, soul torch, & redstone torch)
- Redder redstone torch
- Fixed seagrass clipping out of water
- Better levers with a Redstone power indicator 
- Farmland now has sides
- Farmland has proper textures for each moisture level
- Better sugar cane texture
- Fixed flower pots
- Centered chiseled bricks
- Variated redstone dust
- Dripleaf stems no longer clip into the leaf
- Better ender dragon egg texture and model
- Melons and pumpkins have a bottom texture
- Better enchanting table texture
- Enchanting table book z-fighting has been fixed
- Better bedrock texture
- Better iron bar texture
- Muddier mud (Mud is brown)
- Better fence textures
- Better button textures
- Better better pressure plate textures
- Blinking ender portal frame

Entities:
- Cows have a better model ([ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) & [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) required)
- **(OLDER VERSIONS)** Sheared sheep now retain their color, inspired by Bedrock which does the same. ([ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) required)
- Better chicken model ([ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) & [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) required)
- Baby chick model ([ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) & [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) required)
- Chicken variants ([ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) & [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) required)
- Fixed pivot on the chicken's wings ([ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) & [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) required)
- Iron golem flowers are red, like the roses they give
- Creepers have a better texture
- Blaze underside has been fixed
- Donkeys have satchels instead of chests
- Better chest texture
- Chests have proper particles

GUI:

*If [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) is installed there are multiple different choices you can make, including a vanilla/off toggle for almost all features*

- Hearts have been given more depth and detail
- Hunger has been given more depth and detail
  
- Hotbar no longer has that ugly background, and has been made much cleaner but still keeping with the vanilla style. (Multiple hotbar styles are available if [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) is used)
- Better Anvil and Inventory GUI
- More transparent UI (beacon and crafting book, toasts, etc)

Misc:
- Removed helmet blips (Can be disabled with [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts))
- Leather armor overlay has been removed
- Map icons have some added shading
- Capitalized song names
- Hundreds of new in-game splashes
- Better beacon beam

*And probably other things we forgot about!*
   </details>

#

Stellar Tweaks has built-in support for multiple mods, and uses the features of several others as well. **<u>All mods are optional</u>**. 
Features **ONLY** available when using certain mods will be marked so in screenshots, and when mentioned.

Stellar Tweaks is fully customizable with the use of the [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) mod, when installed you can toggle almost everything on and off, and have additional features!

<details><summary>List of supported mods</summary>

- [Detail Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar) & [Detail Armor Bar Reconstructed](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar-reconstructed)
- [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Cosmetic Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetic-armor)
- [Plenty Of Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/plenty-of-armors)
- [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft)
- [Dehydration](https://modrinth.com/mod/dehydration)

Want support for another mod to be added? *Ask on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8)!*

***All mods are <u>optional</u> and not required for this pack to function.***

</details>

<details><summary>List of mods for extra features</summary>

- (Highly reccomended) [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify) 
Allows you to update the resource pack in-game!
- (Highly recommended) [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)
- (Highly reccomended) [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) & [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) (Only required for versions below 1.21.5)
- [Loading Screen Tips](https://modrinth.com/mod/loadingscreentips)

P.S Anything requiring [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) & [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) *should* work with Optifine. But Optifine has not been tested.

***All mods are <u>optional</u> and not required for this pack to function.***

</details>

Everything **should** work from 26.1.x-1.17 <u>_(Ignore version warnings)_</u>, and anything before that was only briefly tested. Most changes, especially the basic ones, will work even pre-1.17.

*Want to talk? Check out our Discord! You can also check out the Trello for a list of what's planned!*

[![Discord](https://i.postimg.cc/Bt9MMcSt/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8) [![Trello](https://i.postimg.cc/4nkBBbft/Trello.png)](https://trello.com/b/qqx0Nr14/minecraft-stellar-tweaks)
#

## <u>Q & A</u>

<details><summary>Help, the dragon egg is broken with Complementary Reimagined! </summary>

That can be fixed by unzipping the shader and going to `shaders/lib/materials/materialHandling/terrainIPBR.glsl` (file can be opened with any text editor, Notepad works) and changing

```javascript
                            else /*if (mat == 10572)*/ { // Dragon Egg
                                emission = float(color.b > 0.1) * 10.0 + 0.6;
```
*(You can just search `Dragon Egg` to find it!)*

**to**
```javascript
                            else /*if (mat == 10572)*/ { // Dragon Egg
                                emission = float(color.b > 0.1) * 1.0 + 0.6;
```
that's it, changing a 10 to a 1 solves the entire problem.

Make sure to zip it back up when you're done!

*If you're using a different shader that is doing something very similar, this advice might still work, but it's not guaranteed to work.*

</details>

<details><summary>Is this compatible with Fresh Animations?</summary>

**Support currently broken, will be fixed shortly**

Yes! This is compatible with [Fresh Animations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations) ***IF*** you download the [Stellar Tweaks + FA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-tweaks-fa) pack.

</details>

<details><summary>Can you add <X>/ support <X> mod? </summary>

Don't know, join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8) and ask! 
</details>

<details><summary>How do I know what's being worked on?</summary>

We have a Trello we use to keep track of everything being added, and it contains the upcoming changelog(s), you can find it [here](https://trello.com/b/qqx0Nr14/minecraft-stellar-tweaks)!
</details>

<details><summary>I like this one feature but not everything else, can you make that a separate pack? </summary>

As of now, you can use [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) to turn almost every single feature of Stellar Tweaks on/off!

In addition, if you join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8), we can tell you how to manually delete something so you don't need to have it. We can also help you if something breaks with shaders!

Splitting some things off into their own separate packs for those who just want that specific thing is planned, but only once we feel the feature is 100% complete and requires no more work.

</details>

<details><summary>Optifine? </summary>

This pack uses either [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) for items (in older versions), and [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) + [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) for entities.

Optifine does technically work with this pack, but it generally brings no benefit nowadays and is incompatible with way too much stuff to bother properly supporting, so it has not been properly tested.

***All mods are <u>optional</u> and not required for this pack to function.***

</details>

<details><summary>Respackopts crashes my game/doesn't work! </summary>

  [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) is compatible with Fabric and NeoForge, but not Quilt. Can't use Quilt. or Liteloader. But why would you be using that??

In addition, respackopts (and several other mods this pack optionally uses) are **COMPLETELY INCOMPATIBLE** with clients such as Feather (Now Dawn.gg), you shouldn't be using these clients anyway as they are often incredibly shady and break a ton of things, but completely break when used with respackopts.

</details>

# ARR License Exceptions

<details><summary>License Exceptions</summary>

- If you're here to see if you can use it in YT videos and the like and such, the answer is yes. Ideally pop a link in the description but that's not 100% required.

- You may add this resource pack to modpacks, but it must NOT be modified* and ideally credit is directly and clearly given in the description in the form of a link to the [source](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-tweaks) on Modrinth. (Required if not able to link in dependencies, such as not hosted on Modrinth)

*unless said modifications are directly approved by us, which may be asked for on the [Discord](https://discord.gg/hQqx2mqMz8).

*You can always just make a custom pack and override features via load order, in most cases there is no need to modify our pack unless you are editing sprite assets in which case yes you must ask for approval.

- If you're using our pack in a video please add a link to it in the description if possible.

- You may NOT smell the textures.

- We reserve the right to revoke any priveleges and/or exceptions (or the like) given for any reason from a specific group or individual or in its entirety.

*Everything we have written here precedes any exceptions given inside any version of the pack itself*

*Any exceptions not written here but included inside the pack itself should be considered not applicable, now null and void.*

</details>

# 
[![Just look at the gallery already. Please. I beg of you.](https://i.postimg.cc/9Qyv50s3/Gallery.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-tweaks/gallery)


[![Try out Stellar 3D!](https://i.postimg.cc/wjYGVHM4/Also-Try-Stellar-3D-2.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-3d)

[![Stellar Tweaks + Fresh Animations Compatibility Pack](https://i.postimg.cc/7YGF9mV2/Stellar-Tweaks-FA-Banner.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellar-tweaks-fa)

The shader used in some screenshots is [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) using [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) in [Minecraft Java Edition](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us)
